ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: By the sky and the night comer -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: By the heaven and the nightly star!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And what can make you know what is the night comer?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And what will make you realize what the nightly star is?
˹It is˺ the star of piercing brightness.

ayahs.textArabic: إِن كُلُّ نَفۡسٖ لَّمَّا عَلَيۡهَا حَافِظٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: In kullu nafsin lamma AAalayha hafithun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: There is no soul but that it has over it a protector.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: There is no soul without a vigilant angel ˹recording everything˺.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So let man observe from what he was created.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Let people then consider what they were created from!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: He was created from a fluid, ejected,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹They were˺ created from a spurting fluid,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Emerging from between the backbone and the ribs.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: stemming from between the backbone and the ribcage.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, Allah, to return him [to life], is Able.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Surely He is fully capable of bringing them back ˹to life˺

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: The Day when secrets will be put on trial,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: on the Day all secrets will be disclosed.

ayahs.textArabic: فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن قُوَّةٖ وَلَا نَاصِرٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Fama lahu min quwwatin wala nasirin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Then man will have no power or any helper.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Then one will have neither power nor ˹any˺ helper.
By the sky with its recurring cycles,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And [by] the earth which cracks open,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and the earth with its sprouting plants!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, the Qur'an is a decisive statement,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Surely this ˹Quran˺ is a decisive word,
and is not to be taken lightly.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, they are planning a plan,
But I am planning a plan.
So allow time for the disbelievers. Leave them awhile.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So bear with the disbelievers ˹O Prophet˺. Let them be for ˹just˺ a little while.
